name: GRM Teal
usage: Primary accent for GRM parent brand. CTAs, teal bars, dividers, badge backgrounds, header bar accents, stat callout labels, hover states, teal O in Front Porch logo
never_use_with: Never use as full-page background. Never use teal text on teal. Never use on dark backgrounds for body text.

name: Dusty Rose
usage: Secondary warm accent. Front Porch lifestyle sections, section backgrounds, editorial spreads, warm dividers, soft card borders. Used as full background color on lifestyle spread pages.
never_use_with: Never use in Closing Table materials. Never use as primary CTA. Never use as body text color.

name: Sage Green
usage: Tertiary nature accent used sparingly. Front Porch pull quotes, outdoor/community content accents, environmental section dividers. Green italic pull quote text.
never_use_with: Never use in Closing Table. Never use as primary brand color or CTA. Never use for headers.

name: Warm Brown
usage: Earth tone accent. Second O in The Front Porch logo. Subtle borders, warm dividers, photography styling direction toward leather and wood textures.
never_use_with: Never use as body text color. Never use on dark backgrounds. Never use as CTA button. One accent per section maximum.

name: Near Black
usage: Dark section backgrounds, headers, footer, dark cards. Body text on cream and white. Closing Table cover dark treatment.
never_use_with: Never pair dark text on dark background. Always verify contrast ratio exceeds 4.5:1.

name: White
usage: Text on dark backgrounds, text on teal backgrounds, logo on dark. Clean card backgrounds. Closing Table large headline type on dark photography.
never_use_with: Never use white text on dusty rose — insufficient contrast. Never use as primary brand accent.

name: Warm Cream
usage: Page backgrounds, breathing space between content sections, light card backgrounds. Softer than pure white for premium printed feel on screen.
never_use_with: Never use low-contrast text on cream without checking ratio. Never use cream text on white.
